name: inboxforge-aio
description: InboxForge AIO - All-in-One Matrix-powered email client with AI drafts

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=apps/api && npm install --workspace=apps/bridge-outlook && npm install --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web --if-present || echo 'No linter configured'
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/web --if-present || echo 'No tests configured'
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e --workspace=apps/web --if-present || echo 'No E2E tests configured'

author: Stefan Rosenlund <mail@stefanrosenlund.dk>
